title: Wxrlds's Optimisations
description: Collection of various optimisation and QOL mods
body:
Collection of various optimisation and QOL mods to make the vanilla game run better on old(er) and newer hardware. [Need a server? Just click on the Picture, use the code WXRLDS for 25% off of your first month and play with your friends!](https://bisecthosting.com/Wxrlds?r=wxrldss+optimisations+modrinth) [![Bisect Hosting Banner Code: WXRLDS for 25% off](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/89931e9d-89a9-4f4e-9ba0-e5dedbff00b3.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/Wxrlds?r=wxrldss+optimisations+modrinth) How is this different from [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)? * There are no custom item/entity model features from OptiFine alternatives * There are utility mods like Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, Litematica, Item Scroller, Carpet,... * There are some other mods like Axiom, ViaFabricPlus, CalcMod,... [You can find a full modlist here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wxrldss-optimisations/version/v1.21.11-1)
Credits
